tools.name: audit_design_principles
tools.description: Perform a heuristic design and accessibility audit on a snippet of UI code. Checks for typographic hierarchy, visual noise, and common accessibility issues.

tools.name: check_design_memory
tools.description: Check if the design memory for a project is up to date. Returns freshness status without regenerating.

tools.name: get_asset_manifest
tools.description: Return a categorized list of project assets with public URLs and metadata.

tools.name: get_component_recipe
tools.description: Get the full recipe for a component including code template, JSON schema, slots, and AI usage rules.

tools.name: get_design_memory
tools.description: Get the current design memory content for a project without writing files. Useful for previewing the design context or loading it into the conversation. Includes age-based warnings if the memory is potentially stale.

tools.name: get_project_context
tools.description: Fetch the complete design profile for a project by slug. Returns framework target, active style pack, components, assets, and token count. Also checks for stale design memory.

tools.name: get_theme_tokens
tools.description: Export the project token map in tailwind config, CSS custom properties, or raw JSON format.

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List all available component recipes with summary metadata. Optionally filter by style pack compatibility.

tools.name: open_design_studio
tools.description: Open the AIUI Design Studio in the browser. Returns a URL where the user can visually select style packs, pick components, and configure their design system. After the user is done, call sync_design_memory to pull the updated design into the project.

tools.name: suggest_pattern_promotion
tools.description: Suggest promoting a repetitive design pattern into a formal design token or component recipe. Should be called when the agent detects it has used the same hardcoded value or JSX structure multiple times.

tools.name: sync_design_memory
tools.description: Generate or update the persistent design memory files for a project. Creates .aiui/design-memory.md (full design context for Claude) and .aiui/tokens.json (machine-readable tokens). Supports incremental mode that computes a diff and returns early if nothing changed. Add "See .aiui/design-memory.md for the active design system" to your CLAUDE.md so Claude loads it automatically in every conversation.

tools.name: validate_ui_output
tools.description: Check generated UI code for compliance against the project's design system. Validates colors, fonts, spacing, radii, font sizes, z-index, opacity, border widths, accessibility, and semantic data binding.

tools.name: apply_style_pack
tools.description: Apply a style pack to a project by slug. Updates the project active style pack and returns confirmation.

tools.name: create_style_pack
tools.description: Create a new style pack with design tokens. Returns the pack ID and slug.

tools.name: fix_compliance_issues
tools.description: Auto-fix design token compliance violations in code. Replaces non-compliant values with approved design tokens.

tools.name: init_project
tools.description: Bootstrap a brand-new project from scratch with a starter style pack, design profile, and complete design memory files. Use this as the FIRST call on any fresh or empty repo — there is no need to import tokens, pick a style pack, or pre-create anything in the dashboard beforehand. Creates a dashboard-visible project in your active organization, seeds it with the shadcn/ui Essentials starter pack (or whichever pack you pass), and writes .aiui/design-memory.md, .aiui/tokens.json, and .aiui/project.json into the target directory. Idempotent: calling it twice with the same slug in the same org returns the existing project untouched — no overwrite.

tools.name: reset_project_to_starter
tools.description: Reset a project back to a freshly-seeded starter pack state, discarding the active-pack selection and selected-component customizations on its design profile. Use this as a safety net when a project's design configuration has been mangled and you want a clean slate without deleting the project row or its private style packs. Deletes the existing design profile, re-runs the starter seed (defaults to shadcn-essentials-v4), and returns fresh .aiui/design-memory.md, .aiui/tokens.json, and .aiui/project.json file contents to write back into the repo. Destructive on the design profile — any unsaved profile customizations will be lost.

tools.name: undo_last_token_change
tools.description: (stub) Revert the most recent design token change for a project. Not yet implemented: per-token before/after history is not currently tracked. Returns a not_implemented status with suggested alternatives. Will land when the changelog gains per-token before/after state. For now, use `apply_style_pack` to swap packs or `update_tokens` to manually revert values.

tools.name: update_tokens
tools.description: Add, update, or delete design tokens in a style pack. Returns counts of added, modified, and deleted tokens.
